        PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace g p 1 μ),
    ‖T (f + g) x‖ₑ ≤ ‖T f x + T g x‖ₑ
T_submul : ∀ (a : 𝕂) (f : α → 𝕂) (x : α'), ‖T (a • f) x‖ₑ ≤ ‖a‖ₑ • ‖T f x‖ₑ
weakly_cont_T :
  ∀ {f : α → 𝕂} {fs : ℕ → α → 𝕂},
    LocallyIntegrable f μ →
      (∀ (n : ℕ), AEStronglyMeasurable (fs n) μ) →
        (∀ (a : α), Monotone fun n => ‖fs n a‖) →

            ∀ (G : Set α'),
              eLpNorm (T f) 1 (ν.restrict G) ≤ Filter.limsup (fun n => eLpNorm (T (fs n)) 1 (ν.restrict G)) Filter.atTop

G_finite : ν G < ⊤
g : α → 𝕂
stronglyMeasurable_g : StronglyMeasurable g
hg : @MeasureTheory.eLorentzNorm α 𝕂 m0 SeminormedAddGroup.toContinuousENorm.toENorm g p 1 μ < ⊤
g₁ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g₂ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g₃ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g₄ : α → NNReal := ⋯
g_decomposition :
  g =
    1 • ⇑(algebraMap ℝ 𝕂) ∘ NNReal.toReal ∘ g₁ + -1 • ⇑(algebraMap ℝ 𝕂) ∘ NNReal.toReal ∘ g₂ +

T' : (α → NNReal) → α' → ε' := ⋯
hT' :

    ν ↑c
weaklyCont_T' :

T'_subadd :
  ∀ (f g : α → NNReal)
    (a : @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α NNReal m0 instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm NNReal.instTopologicalSpace f p 1 μ)
    (a : @MeasureTheory.MemLorentz α NNReal m0 instENormedSpaceNNReal.toENorm NNReal.instTopologicalSpace g p 1 μ),
    eLpNorm (T' (f + g)) 1 (ν.restrict G) ≤ eLpNorm (T' f) 1 (ν.restrict G) + eLpNorm (T' g) 1 (ν.restrict G)
T'_submul : ∀ (f : α → NNReal) (a : NNReal), eLpNorm (T' (a • f)) 1 (ν.restrict G) ≤ eLpNorm (a • T' f) 1 (ν.restrict G)
helper :
  ∀ {f : α → NNReal},

                  exact RCLike.continuous_ofReal.comp <| Continuous.comp NNReal.continuous_coe <| Real.continuous_toNNReal.comp <| continuous_neg.comp RCLike.continuous_re
                · refine lt_of_le_of_lt (eLorentzNorm_mono (Eventually.of_forall fun x ↦ ?_)) hg
                  simp only [Function.comp_apply, norm_algebraMap', Real.norm_eq_abs, NNReal.abs_eq, enorm_eq_self]
                  rw [Real.toNNReal_le_iff_le_coe]
                  exact ⟨(le_abs_self _).trans (abs_neg _ ▸ RCLike.abs_re_le_norm _), norm_nonneg _⟩)

(by
                apply AEStronglyMeasurable.restrict
                refine (T_meas ⟨Measurable.aestronglyMeasurable ?_, lt_of_le_of_lt (eLorentzNorm_mono ?_) hg⟩).enorm
                · dsimp [g₂]
                  exact measurable_toNNReal.comp (measurable_neg.comp (RCLike.continuous_re.measurable.comp stronglyMeasurable_g.measurable))
                · filter_upwards with x
                  dsimp [g₂]
                  simp only [Function.comp_apply, RCLike.norm_ofReal, Real.norm_eq_abs, enorm_eq_self, coe_nnnorm]
                  rw [Real.coe_toNNReal', max_le_iff]
                  exact ⟨(neg_le_abs _).trans (RCLike.abs_re_le_norm _), norm_nonneg _⟩)
